overall.description: A cinematic scene from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) depicting a cowboy character sitting inside a canvas tent at night, illuminated by campfire and lantern light. The character eventually exits and the camera performs a slow orbit around the campsite, showcasing the tent exterior and surrounding forest environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: canvas tent interior with camping gear

agents.ego_description: sitting inside the tent facing the entrance, watching the campfire flicker outside

entered.detail: white canvas tent walls surrounding the viewpoint with triangular entrance opening
burning campfire visible through the tent entrance, casting orange light
lit oil lantern with glass enclosure hanging inside the tent
rolled bedding or blanket on the ground to the left side
central wooden support pole of the tent structure

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a canvas tent at night, with the camera positioned behind a seated cowboy character. Warm light from an oil lantern on the right and a campfire visible through the entrance illuminate the interior, which contains a bedroll on the left and a central support pole.

scene_state.functional_zone: tent entrance threshold transitioning to forest

events.description: character stands up from sitting position and begins moving toward the left side exit
camera moves forward from inside the tent to the exterior, revealing the night sky

agents.ego_description: standing up and walking out of the tent to the left, leaving the frame

entered.detail: dark night sky with scattered clouds becoming visible as camera exits
trees and bushes surrounding the campsite perimeter

segments.scene_description: The character stands and exits the tent to the left as the camera moves forward, transitioning from the enclosed interior to the open exterior. The night sky and surrounding forest become visible as the tent walls move to the left of the frame and the interior elements are left behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest campsite with canvas tent and fire

events.description: camera passes behind a small leafy sapling in the foreground, partially obscuring the tent

agents.ego_description: no ego character visible; camera performs a slow cinematic orbit around the campsite

entered.detail: small leafy tree sapling in the foreground that the camera passes

segments.scene_description: The camera performs a slow, smooth orbit around the exterior of the tent, showcasing the illuminated canvas structure from various angles against the dark forest backdrop. The campfire continues to burn brightly as the camera circles, passing by foreground vegetation and revealing the tent glowing warmly in the night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the intimate, enclosed interior of a canvas tent into a wide, nocturnal forest campsite. It begins behind a seated cowboy, where the space is warmly lit by an oil lantern and the glow of a campfire visible through the entrance. As the character stands and exits to the left, the camera glides forward, shifting from the sheltered interior to the open night air as the tent walls recede from the frame. The scene then expands into a slow, smooth orbit around the exterior of the tent, revealing the glowing canvas structure against a dark backdrop of towering trees. Finally, the camera circles through foreground vegetation, keeping the brightly burning campfire as a central point of light within the surrounding wilderness.
